_comment: Generated by kitsoki persona-qa deck from tools/persona_qa/examples/runs/slidey-architect-review (persona-qa-slidey-architect-review). Re-run the command instead of hand-editing derived scenes.

scenes.narration: This deck was generated deterministically from an existing Persona QA run bundle and its recorded media manifest.
scenes.subtitle: Slidey - Software architect presenting frequently - persona-qa-slidey-architect-review
scenes.title: Slidey Architect Review

scenes.caption: Software architect presenting frequently

cards.label: Surface
lines: Open the generated deck and inspect the JSON source before rendering video.
cards.sub: deck-as-code authoring with quick local preview

cards.label: First question
lines: Can I turn an architecture decision into a polished, rerunnable presentation without hand-editing pixels?

cards.label: Evidence
lines: Validated Slidey JSON, playback clips, layout checks, and a bundle suitable for sharing.

cards.label: Risk focus
lines: Any visual that cannot be reproduced, diffed, bundled, or reviewed before a meeting.

cards.label: Finding bias
lines: Prefer findings that improve repeatable technical communication over one-off polish.

scenes.narration: The deck keeps the persona lens visible so reviewers judge the scenario evidence from the intended point of view.
scenes.title: Persona lens

scenes.caption: Rows are sorted by scenario id for deterministic output.
scenes.narration: The scenario table ties each natural-use task to its outcome, evidence coverage, and playback count.
scenes.title: Recorded scenarios

scenes.caption: Bundle readiness, evidence coverage, and the highest-signal checks.

items.detail: For a software architect who presents often, Slidey is strong when the talk must be reproducible, visual, and evidence-backed.
items.label: ready_with_risks

items.detail: Slidey JSON is reviewable and diffable enough for architecture decks.
items.label: deck-as-code

items.detail: Slidey exposes validation and audit commands that catch common rendering failures before a final video render.
items.label: layout-gates

items.detail: Recorded rrweb clips can become standalone deck scenes.
items.label: playback-embedding

scenes.narration: The review scene summarizes bundle readiness without rerunning capture or model work.
scenes.title: Review gate

scenes.caption:
compose-architecture-deck: validated

scenes.narration: Findings are grouped by type so a technical reviewer can separate strengths from product risks.
scenes.title: Persona judgement
